summary: Comprehensive testing of unified Admin Panel at /admin. All 5 tabbed sections tested: Beta & Invites, Daily Prompts, Bingo Squares, Reports, Platform Settings. Backend: 23/23 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components and interactions working correctly.
passed_tests: Admin panel loads at /admin for admin user (demo@example.com)
Admin panel has 5 navigation tabs with correct icons
Tab navigation works - clicking each tab loads corresponding section
URL updates with ?section= parameter when switching tabs
Beta & Invites: signups table shows 5 signups with name, instagram, email, feature, date, notes
Beta & Invites: Invite Codes sub-tab switches correctly
Beta & Invites: Generate 1 code button works (HG-XXXX format)
Beta & Invites: Copy Link button visible for unused codes
Beta & Invites: CSV export button present
Daily Prompts: Lists 34 prompts with text, scheduled_date, response_count
Daily Prompts: Create new prompt form with text/date inputs works
Daily Prompts: Toggle active/inactive on prompt works
Daily Prompts: Edit prompt text form appears on pencil click
Bingo Squares: Lists 27 squares with emoji, text, active toggle
Bingo Squares: Create new square form with text/emoji inputs works
Bingo Squares: Toggle active/inactive on square works
Reports: Shows 2 reports with type, reason, status, reporter
Reports: Filter by status buttons work (All, Pending, Reviewed, Actioned, Dismissed)
Reports: Change report status via action buttons works
Platform Settings: Shows current fee value (6%)
Platform Settings: Save new fee value works with toast confirmation
Non-admin user redirected to /hive when accessing /admin
Logged-out user redirected to / (landing page) when accessing /admin
/admin/beta redirects to /admin?section=beta
seed_data_creation: Created test prompts and bingo squares during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Admin Panel at /admin is fully functional with 5 sections: 1) Beta & Invites - signups table + invite codes with generate/copy/CSV export 2) Daily Prompts - 34 prompts with create/edit/toggle active 3) Bingo Squares - 27 squares with create/edit/toggle 4) Reports - filter by status + change status via action buttons 5) Platform Settings - fee input with save. All backend APIs use paths like ${API}/admin/settings where API already includes /api prefix.
mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints functional
